subject: Product Management
title: Concierge MVP
description: A quick win: understand Concierge MVP.

hook.text: Before building an algorithm, do the work manually. If users love the result, then automate it.

buildup.text: A concierge MVP delivers the product experience using humans behind the scenes instead of technology.

discovery.text: Zappos started by photographing shoes in local stores. When someone ordered, the founder bought and shipped them himself.

twist.text: It doesn't scale — and that's the point. You're testing value, not scalability. Scale comes after validation.

climax.text: The concierge MVP answers the most important question first: 'Does anyone actually want this?'

punchline.text: Do it by hand first. Automate after you prove it works.

quiz.question: What is a concierge MVP?
options: Delivering the product experience manually to test value before building technology
A fully automated minimum viable product
A luxury version of the product
